query:
-- Crear enum para estado de crowdfunding
-- MySQL no soporta CREATE TYPE, usamos ENUM directamente en la tabla

-- Crear tabla de proyectos de crowdfunding
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crowdfunding_projects (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  zone VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  address VARCHAR(500),
  targetAmount BIGINT NOT NULL,
  raisedAmount BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  minimumInvestment BIGINT DEFAULT 50000000 NOT NULL,
  totalPowerKw INT DEFAULT 480 NOT NULL,
  chargerCount INT DEFAULT 4 NOT NULL,
  chargerPowerKw INT DEFAULT 120 NOT NULL,
  hasSolarPanels BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  estimatedRoiPercent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 85.00,
  estimatedPaybackMonths INT DEFAULT 14,
  status ENUM('DRAFT', 'OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'FUNDED', 'BUILDING', 'OPERATIONAL', 'CLOSED') DEFAULT 'DRAFT' NOT NULL,
  targetDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  launchDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  fundedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  operationalDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  priority INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  stationId INT,
  createdById INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Crear tabla de participaciones
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crowdfunding_participations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  investorId INT NOT NULL,
  amount BIGINT NOT NULL,
  participationPercent DECIMAL(6,4) NOT NULL,
  paymentStatus ENUM('PENDING', 'COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'REFUNDED') DEFAULT 'PENDING' NOT NULL,
  paymentDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255),
  contractSigned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  contractSignedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  contractUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
